appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for Swift/Xcode contract tests and documented code-signing-off flags required in this environment.

frictions.description: Initial xcodebuild invocation failed due to signing requirement on OpenBurnBar entitlements.
frictions.resolution: Reran scoped tests with CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' DEVELOPMENT_TEAM='' and tests succeeded.

frictions.description: Scoped xcodebuild produced pre-existing compiler warnings in RemoteSyncWatermarkTests for redundant 'try try' expressions.
frictions.resolution: Warnings were non-fatal; all assigned tests still passed in the same run.
